title: tetracelium
body:
Adds compatability between tetra and other mods. Allows weapons and tools from other mods to be converted into tetra items, and for materials added by other mods to be used for modules and improvements in Tetra. Also adds in-depth integration for a small set of mods.

# Generic materials
Most of the materials listed below are added through tags, materials become available in tetra as long as some mod adds an item with the matching tag.

## Bone
* Dragon bone (Alex's mobs?)
* Wither bone (Alex's mobs?)
## Fibre
* Hemp (Immersive engineering, ?)
## Gemstone
* Agate
* Certus quartz (Applied energistics 2)
* Citrine
* Ruby
* Sapphire
## Metal
* Bronze
* Copper
* Electrum
* Lead
* Nickel
* Osmium (Mekanism, ?)
* Silver
* Steel
* Tin
## Wood
* Baobab
* Cherry
* Maple
* Treated wood (Immersive engineering, ?)

# Farmer's Delight
Integrates with Farmer's Delight in a few different ways:
* Adds two new materials: Straw (fibre) and Canvas (fabric)
* The starter belt can be crafted from rope instead of string
* Adds canvas and rope variants for several belt modules
* Adds a knife module for the sword blade slot
* Knives can be converted into tetra items and Tetra knives can cut things on the cutting board
* Any tetra item used with the cutting board gain honing progression

# Botania
Allows several items in Botania to be used as materials in Tetra and for some Botania items to be converted into tetra items. Tetra items with major modules crafted from Botania materials repairs themselves using mana as if they were Botania items.

## Fibre
* Mana string
## Metal
* Manasteel
* Terrasteel
* Elementium
## Wood
* Dreamwood
* Livingwood

## Apotheosis
Allows items to retain their Apotheosis affixes and sockets when converted into a tetra item.
## The Twilight Forest 
Allows materials from The Twilight Forest to be used with tetra, and for most weapons and tools to be converted into tetra items. Adds two new schematics that allow items from The Twilight Forest to be used to improve tetra items.

![ironwood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fb75e4f664648629ecde867050115d154be7bb2.png)![steeleaf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26c7b0eb294c9bebd5db6241ff90c649307e0ee3.png)![knightmetal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f4bfae260fd521f4629769dd1ce8df2c002d273.png)![fiery ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9ec05a39acb7efe68d58c268a2d5dfacd6c3a5f.png)![fiery bond schematic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2845f319ae15ffe80769c0c4f688655164764a19.png)![modular ice bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e773c820279c9c1412bc32cedc63b2d34ccba44.png)![twilight focus schematic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/484f0a405694c6f77db7ecbd2c18934a553faedc.png)


## Support and Contributions
I develop and maintain tetra in my spare time, if you enjoy what you've seen so far and want to help me make it better please consider supporting me on patreon.

## Discord
I've set up a discord server to talk about tetra: https://discord.gg/MyjK4Fx, jump on if you have questions, need some help, want talk about datapacks or mod integrations, or to get sneak-peeks at upcoming features.

## Licensing & use
Feel free to use this in modpacks or compilations as long as it's distributed through modrinth or curseforge.
